/usr/bin/g++  -W -Wextra -Wall -pthread -Wsign-compare -Wshadow -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-strict-aliasing -Wno-invalid-offsetof -march=native -Werror -fno-builtin-memcmp -g -DROCKSDB_USE_RTTI CMakeFiles/object_registry_test.dir/utilities/object_registry_test.cc.o -o object_registry_test  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jeff-wang/LSM-tuning/comparedDBs/SAunedb/build libtestutillib.a libtestharness.a third-party/gtest-1.8.1/fused-src/gtest/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liburing.a librocksdb.so.9.4.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread
